user_stories.title: Deep Link to Video
user_stories.i_want_to: click a search result and jump to that exact moment in the YouTube video
user_stories.so_that: I can watch the context and delivery, not just read text.
acceptance_criteria: Estimate timestamp for each transcript chunk (based on word count vs duration ratio, or actual timestamps if available).
Embed YouTube player in the results page jumping to the start of the relevant segment.
user_stories.technical_notes: Accuracy depends on transcript quality. Fallback to start of episode if estimation is too risky.
